name: Solution Scoping & Requirements Gathering
description: Elicit business objectives, success metrics, data sources, and constraints to shape onboarding scope and plan.

name: Solution Architecture & Design
description: Design target solution architecture across data flows, security, environments, and analytics components.

name: Environment Provisioning
description: Provision cloud environments, networking, and access for dev, test, and prod tenants.

name: Security & Compliance Review
description: Assess data protection, access controls, and compliance requirements prior to implementation.

name: Data Integration Setup
description: Connect source systems, configure connectors, and establish data ingestion patterns.

name: ETL/ELT Pipeline Configuration
description: Configure and orchestrate transformations, data quality checks, and scheduling.

name: Analytics Model Configuration
description: Parameterize analytics models, metrics, and dashboards for client-specific use cases.

name: Implementation Project Management
description: Plan, track, and coordinate tasks, dependencies, risks, and stakeholders across the rollout.

name: QA & UAT Coordination
description: Plan, execute, and coordinate system/functional tests and user acceptance activities.

name: Runbook & Documentation
description: Create deployment guides, operating procedures, and data lineage documentation.

name: Customer Training & Enablement
description: Train admins and end users, develop learning materials, and measure adoption.

name: Hypercare & Post-Go-Live Support
description: Provide intensive support, monitoring, and issue triage immediately after go-live.
